rationale: Gov't Code §2001.173 governs trial de novo review of contested agency cases. The proposed homestead exemption dollar increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on this procedural review framework.
quote: If the manner of review authorized by law for the decision in a contested case that is the subject of complaint is by trial de novo, the reviewing court shall try each issue of fact and law in the manner that applies to other civil suits in this state
_note: No conflict. The rule addresses judicial review procedure for contested cases; the proposed change modifies a tax exemption amount. Unrelated statutory provisions.
